## Case Type

- [ ] Phone-shot border/crop issue
- [ ] Face redraw / identity drift
- [ ] Large group photo
- [ ] Packaging/source selection issue
- [ ] Prompt improvement
- [ ] Other

## What Happened

Describe the source condition and the restoration result.

## What Should The Workflow Do?

Describe the desired quality gate, fallback, or prompt behavior.

## Safe Example

Only attach public-domain, synthetic, or permission-safe images.
